title: Rolim de Moura Heat Wave
lead: Rolim de Moura is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.03. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Rolim de Moura has led to a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 47%, and the wind speed is 10.4 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat-related issues. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure due to the prolonged heat wave, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect residents and infrastructure.
